videos.title: I Visited the Cradle of the Internet
videos.description:
Thanks to Equinix for sponsoring this video and giving us a tour of their facilities! Check them out below and learn more!

Sustainability report: https://eqix.it/3Q4fSEU
Product and solution: https://eqix.it/4a7Ilk3

We traveled to Data Center Alley in Ashburn, VA, and went inside some of the facilities that make up the backbone of the modern internet. Our Sponsor, Equinix, threw open the highly-secure doors (and then closed them right behind us) to show us where the clouds connect!

videos.title: The Biggest Test Bench I’ve Ever Seen
videos.description:
Check out ASUS's next gen ASUS AI POD with NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72: https://www.asus.com/event/asus-ai-pod-nvidia-vera-rubin-nvl72/

Learn more about NVIDIA DSX: https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/products/dsx/

A test bench usually means power, cooling, and tools at your fingertips. But what do you do when the hardware you need to validate pulls over 100,000 watts?
ASUS sponsored us to tour their data center R&D lab, where they develop and torture test their enterprise AI server hardware.
